classes.name: CandleBuilder
classes.docstring: Aggregates RealtimeBars into multi-timeframe OHLCV candles.

methods.name: __init__
register_callback
methods.docstring: Replace the candle-closed callback (e.g. wired in by LiveEngine).

methods.name: add_bar
methods.signature: def add_bar(self, bar: RealtimeBar) -> None
methods.docstring: Process one bar and close any completed time windows.

methods.name: get_buffer
methods.signature: def get_buffer(self, symbol: str, tf: str) -> list[OHLCVBar]
methods.docstring: Return a copy of the completed candle list for (symbol, tf).

methods.name: reset
methods.signature: def reset(self, symbol: str) -> None
methods.docstring: Clear all in-progress and completed state for *symbol*.

methods.signature: def _ensure_symbol(self, symbol: str) -> None

_noop

top_level_functions.name: _floor_to_tf
top_level_functions.docstring: Floor *dt* to the nearest *tf_secs* boundary (Unix-timestamp aligned).

classes.name: DatabasePersister
classes.docstring: Queues completed candles for async bulk insert.

methods.name: __init__
methods.signature: def __init__(self, db: "DatabaseManager") -> None

methods.name: persist_candle
methods.signature: def persist_candle(self, symbol: str, timeframe: str, bar: OHLCVBar) -> None
methods.docstring: Enqueue a completed candle for async write (non-blocking).

methods.name: stop
methods.signature: def stop(self) -> None
methods.docstring: Send sentinel to writer, flush remaining items, and join thread.

methods.name: _writer_loop
methods.signature: def _writer_loop(self) -> None
methods.docstring: Drain queue every _DRAIN_INTERVAL and bulk-insert to DB.

methods.name: _flush
methods.signature: def _flush(self, items: list[tuple[str, str, OHLCVBar]]) -> None
methods.docstring: Group items by (symbol, timeframe) and bulk-insert.

classes.name: ExitManager
classes.docstring: Evaluates exit conditions for open positions.

methods.name: __init__
methods.signature: def __init__(self) -> None

methods.name: evaluate
methods.signature:
def evaluate(
        self,
        symbol: str,
        bar: OHLCVBar,
        position: OpenPosition,
        bar_cache: dict[str, list[OHLCVBar]],
        config: "StrategyConfig",
    ) -> TradeSignal | None
methods.docstring: Check stop-loss, target, and trailing-stop in priority order.

methods.name: update_trailing_stop
methods.signature:
def update_trailing_stop(
        self,
        symbol: str,
        bar: OHLCVBar,
        position: OpenPosition,
        bar_cache: dict[str, list[OHLCVBar]],
        config: "StrategyConfig",
    ) -> None
methods.docstring: Advance trailing stop upward if price moves above activation threshold.

top_level_functions.docstring: Compute the full EMA series for bar closes.

top_level_functions.signature: def ema_value(bars: list[OHLCVBar], period: int) -> float
top_level_functions.docstring: Return the most recent EMA value.

top_level_functions.signature: def atr(bars: list[OHLCVBar], period: int) -> float

classes.name: LiveEngine
classes.docstring: Orchestrates realtime bar ingestion, candle building, and signal dispatch.

methods.name: __init__
methods.signature:
def __init__(
        self,
        ibkr_client: "IBKRClient",
        candle_builder: "CandleBuilder",
        strategy_engines: list["StrategyEngine"],
        db_persister: "DatabasePersister",
    ) -> None

methods.name: start
methods.signature: def start(self, symbols: list[str]) -> None
methods.docstring: Subscribe to realtime bars for the given symbol list.

methods.name: stop
methods.signature: def stop(self) -> None
methods.docstring: Unsubscribe all symbols and stop the DB persister.
